description: Paul & Jack Bakery — Downtown Raleigh Our Downtown Raleigh location was opened to bring Paul & Jack closer to the heart of the city — a place where people work, walk, meet, and live every day. We wanted this location to feel warm, easy, and alive: a spot to grab a real coffee, enjoy a fresh pastry, meet a friend, or take something beautiful home.

antiPatterns: No fake Google star widgets unless review_score provided. No SaaS feature grids. Food sites should feel sensory (texture, warmth, appetite), not corporate.
